description_long: This object is a large, semi-circular stone block structure with a dark, wood-like texture and a central rectangular stone element. The main body forms a thick, curved barrier with a hollowed-out center, resembling a reception desk or a security checkpoint. The central section features a raised, rectangular block with two openable drawers or compartments visible from the front. The surface of the curved base is broad and flat, suitable for supporting objects or resting items. The front of the structure displays a partial sign or label, suggesting it may serve a functional or administrative purpose in an urban environment. The materials appear solid and robust, with a combination of stone and wood-like finishes.
description: A large, semi-circular stone block structure with a wood-like texture, central raised block, and two openable drawers, resembling a reception or security desk.
description_view_0: From this view, the rectangular central block and the thick, curved base are prominent, with the drawers not visible.
description_view_1: This angle reveals the open drawers extending from the central block and the hollowed-out center of the curved base.
description_view_2: The front view shows the open drawers, the hollowed center, and a partial sign or label on the curved base.
description_view_3: This side view highlights the depth of the curved base and the open drawers, with the central block visible from the side.
attribute_location_context: urban reception area or security checkpoint
attribute_installation_method: set in concrete or anchored to the ground
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering; surfaces appear clean and well-maintained.
attribute_presence_of_markings_or_engrav: Partial sign or label visible on the front; no engravings.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: forms part of a continuous barrier or counter
